title: PCI DSS v4.0 8.3.10 — Certificate Revocation Checking Integrity Evidence
evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with PCI 8.3.10 tagging.

compliance.assurance_rationale: PCI DSS v4.0 8.3.10 requires that revocation status of authentication certificates is checked. UC-17.1.70 evidences continuous OCSP/CRL responder reachability.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that OCSP/CRL revocation checking infrastructure for ISE PKI remains operational, ensuring that revoked certificates are actually rejected at authentication time.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.11.109' archiving OCSP/CRL failure events to `audit_evidence` with `pcidss_clause=8.3.10`.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Block OCSP URL via firewall. Evidence captured.
controlTest.negativeScenario: OCSP/CRL healthy. Empty result; control attested.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (35102, 35201, 35103) earliest=-1d
| stats count by ocsp_responder_url, crl_repository_url, MessageCode
| eval pcidss_clause="8.3.10", control="Cert_Revocation"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence PCI DSS v4.0 8.3.10 — that ISE OCSP/CRL revocation infrastructure is operational.
value: When OCSP/CRL silently fail, ISE may fall back to allow — meaning revoked certs continue to authenticate. PCI 8.3.10 needs continuous proof this isn't happening. Daily archived evidence is the audit-quality artefact.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for ISO 27001:2022 evidence.
visualization: PCI 8.3.10 panel: OCSP/CRL availability gauge; failure trend.

references.title: UC-17.1.70 — OCSP / CRL Reachability and Latency

detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.70 operational.

## Step 1 — Data

Via Cisco ISE add-on.

## Step 2 — Implementation

```ini
[UC-22.11.109: PCI 8.3.10 — Cert Revocation Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.11.109,reg=PCIDSS,clause=8.3.10
```

## Step 3-5 — Validate, Operationalize, Audit

Quarterly evidence pack for QSA review.
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence PCI DSS v4.0 8.3.10 — that ISE OCSP/CRL revocation infrastructure is operational. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.
